skill.name: soultrace
skill.description: Take a personality assessment via the SoulTrace API. Use when the user wants to take a personality test, discover their psychological archetype, understand their personality traits, or get a color-based personality profile. The API uses a 5-color psychological model (White=structure, Blue=understanding, Black=agency, Red=intensity, Green=connection) with Bayesian adaptive question selection to classify users into one of 25 archetypes. Triggers on: personality test, personality assessment, what's my personality, take a quiz, archetype test, color personality, soultrace.
skill.summary: Take an adaptive 24-question personality test using Bayesian inference to classify users into 25 color-based archetypes.
skill.author: soultrace-ai

security_audit.summary: Static scanner detected 21 potential issues but all are false positives. The 13 external_commands findings are curl examples in Markdown documentation (not executable code). The 2 blocker findings misidentified Bayesian statistical inference as weak cryptography. The 5 network findings are legitimate API calls to soultrace.app, the skill's own service. Only risk is external network dependency which is expected for API integration skills.

low_findings.title: External API Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill makes HTTP requests to external API (soultrace.app) for personality assessment functionality. This is expected behavior for API integration but introduces network dependency.

content.user_title: Take a Personality Assessment with SoulTrace
content.value_statement: Discover your psychological archetype through an adaptive 24-question assessment. The SoulTrace API uses Bayesian inference to classify you into one of 25 color-based personality types.
actual_capabilities: Present questions one at a time with clear 1-7 Likert scale instructions
Map natural language responses to numeric scale values
Display color distribution results as percentages
Show archetype name, alignment score, and top 3 matches
Provide link to detailed results page on soultrace.app
limitations: Requires external API access to soultrace.app (no offline mode)
Rate limited to approximately 4 complete tests per hour per IP
Cannot skip questions or auto-answer on behalf of users
Assessment requires all 24 questions for accurate results

use_cases.title: Personal Self-Discovery
use_cases.description: Individual users seeking to understand their personality traits, psychological drives, and behavioral patterns through a structured assessment.

use_cases.title: Team Building Activity
use_cases.description: Teams can take the assessment together to better understand communication styles, work preferences, and potential collaboration dynamics.

use_cases.title: Career Guidance
use_cases.description: Career counselors can use personality results to help clients identify roles and environments that align with their natural tendencies.

prompt_templates.title: Start Personality Test
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to take a personality test to discover my archetype.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - User wants to start the assessment

prompt_templates.title: Continue Assessment
prompt_templates.prompt: Here's my answer to the question: 6
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - User providing their response on the 1-7 scale

prompt_templates.title: Interpret Results
prompt_templates.prompt: I just completed the test and got Blue-Black Strategist. What does this mean for my career choices?
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - User seeking deeper interpretation of results

prompt_templates.title: Understand Color Model
prompt_templates.prompt: Explain the 5-color personality model and what each color represents before I start the test.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - User wants context before beginning assessment

output_examples.input: User: I want to take a personality test
output_examples.output: I'll guide you through a 24-question personality assessment. Each question uses a 1-7 scale where 1=Strongly Disagree, 4=Neutral, and 7=Strongly Agree. Here's your first question: I find deep satisfaction in mastering complex systems. Please rate how much you agree (1-7):

Your archetype is Blue-Black Strategist with 87.3% alignment. Your color distribution: Blue 35%, Black 25%, White 15%, Green 15%, Red 10%. Top matches: Strategist (87.3%), Rationalist (82.1%), Operator (78.5%). View your full results: https://soultrace.app/en/results/abc-123-def

best_practices: Always present questions one at a time and wait for user response before proceeding
Map descriptive answers to numeric scale values when users respond in natural language
Accumulate all answers and send the complete array with each API request
anti_patterns: Never skip questions or auto-answer on behalf of the user
Do not send incomplete answer arrays that omit previous responses
Avoid presenting multiple questions at once which overwhelms users

faq.question: How long does the personality test take?
faq.answer: The assessment consists of 24 questions. Most users complete it in 5-10 minutes depending on how thoughtfully they consider each question.

faq.question: What do the 5 colors represent?
faq.answer: White represents structure and fairness, Blue represents understanding and mastery, Black represents agency and achievement, Red represents intensity and expression, and Green represents connection and growth.

faq.question: Can I retake the test if I want to?
faq.answer: Yes, you can retake the assessment. However, note the rate limit of approximately 4 complete tests per hour per IP address.

faq.question: What happens if I give a non-numeric answer?
faq.answer: Natural language responses are automatically mapped to the 1-7 scale. For example, agree or yes maps to 6, strongly agree or absolutely maps to 7, and neutral or maybe maps to 4.

faq.question: Is my assessment data stored or private?
faq.answer: The API is stateless and does not store your answers between sessions. Your results are accessible via a unique result URL that only you receive.

faq.question: What if I get rate limited during my test?
faq.answer: If you hit the rate limit (100 requests/hour), the API returns a 429 status with a Retry-After header. Wait the specified time before continuing your assessment.
